final:
module counter_8bit(
	input clk,
	input rst_n,
	input en,
	output reg [7:0] count
);

	always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
		if (!rst_n) begin
			count <= 8'b0;
		end
		else if (en) begin
			count <= count + 1;
		end
	end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
